expectations.text: Script creates a model with model create command
A rigid body part is created with correct syntax
expectations.evidence: Line 41: part create rigid_body name_and_position & / part_name = .pendulum.link

expectations.text: At least a pin marker is created on the link and ground
expectations.evidence: marker create for .pendulum.ground.pivot_mkr (ground), .pendulum.link.pin_mkr (link upper end), and .pendulum.link.tip_mkr (link lower end)

expectations.text: A revolute joint is created connecting the link to ground using i_marker_name and j_marker_name
expectations.evidence: constraint create joint revolute / joint_name = .pendulum.rev_pivot / i_marker_name = .pendulum.link.pin_mkr / j_marker_name = .pendulum.ground.pivot_mkr

expectations.text: Gravity field is created with -Y component (e.g. -9806.65 or -9.80665)
Part or marker orientation set to 45 degrees for initial release
expectations.evidence: part modify rigid_body name_and_position / part_name = .pendulum.link / orientation = 0.0D, 0.0D, 45.0D

expectations.text: All keywords spelled out fully (not abbreviated)
expectations.evidence: All keywords fully spelled: model_name, gravity_field_name, x_component_gravity, y_component_gravity, z_component_gravity, marker_name, part_name, joint_name, i_marker_name, j_marker_name, link_name, ellipsoid_name, center_marker, x_scale_factor, number_of_steps, initial_static, etc.

expectations.text: No adams_id specified anywhere in the script
expectations.evidence: No instance of 'adams_id' found anywhere in the script

expectations.text: Mass properties set with part modify (not part create) since the part already exists
expectations.evidence: part modify rigid_body mass_properties / part_name = .pendulum.link / mass = 1.0 / ...

expectations.text: At least one geometry shape (sphere, cylinder, or box) is added to each moving part for visual inspection in Adams View
expectations.evidence: geometry create shape link (.pendulum.link.shape_rod) and geometry create shape ellipsoid (.pendulum.link.ellips_tip) both added to .pendulum.link

expectations.text: CMD script runs in Adams View without any ERROR: lines in aview.log
expectations.evidence: No ERROR: lines found in aview.log. Simulation ran to completion: 'End Simulation' / 'Finished -----' / Elapsed time = 4.16s. Note: echoed Python sys.excepthook traceback (TypeError:/SyntaxError: in comment lines starting with '!') is unrelated to the CMD script.
